common_issues: All 10 use standard title pattern 'Calculator Name (2026) — Free Online Tool' — no benefit-driven hooks
All meta descriptions are auto-generated from first 160 chars of explanation — works but not optimized for click-through
mortgage-affordability and budget-planner have ZERO blog links
tax-calculator, 401k-calculator, and investment-return have only 1 blog link each
All calculators have adequate keyTakeaways (4), tips (3-4), formulas, realWorldUse, examples
improvements_applied_to_top_5: CTR-optimized title tags with benefit-driven, question-format hooks
CTR-optimized meta descriptions with front-loaded benefits
Strengthened examples with concrete dollar amounts and outputs
